title: 20% Off Your First Order
description: Welcome to the market! Enjoy 20% off your initial purchase of hand-picked local goods.
terms: Valid for new accounts only. Minimum spend of ৳1,500 required.

title: ৳200 Off Local Farm Picks
description: Support our local growers. Save ৳200 on orders containing local farm-fresh curations.
terms: Applies to orders of ৳2,500 or more.

title: 15% Off All Organic Picks
description: Fill your kitchen with health. Save 15% on any items bearing the Organic label.
terms: Applies to organic products only. Min spend ৳2,000.

title: Free Home Delivery
description: Skip the delivery fee entirely. Groceries delivered straight to your door on us.
